---
title: InfraWeaver Feature Roadmap — May 2026
description: Large prioritized list of features to make the platform more user-friendly, modular, and easier to extend.
---

# InfraWeaver Feature Roadmap

Generated: 2026-05-03

---

## A. Auth Label System ✅ DONE

| # | Feature | Status |
|---|---------|--------|
| A1 | `--auth` / `--auth-admin` / `--auth-sso` / `--public` flags in `new-app.sh` | ✅ |
| A2 | `infraweaver.io/auth` label on Deployments (visible via `kubectl get deploy -A -L`) | ✅ |
| A3 | Fix `forward-auth` middleware URL to correct Authentik outpost endpoint | ✅ |
| A4 | Add `forward-auth-admin` Traefik Middleware | ✅ |
| A5 | `docs/MIDDLEWARES.md` — full reference for all Traefik middlewares | ✅ |
| A6 | `ingressroute-auth.yaml.example` template | ✅ |

---

## B. Developer Experience (DX)

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| B1 | **`app.yaml` metadata file** per app: `name`, `description`, `url`, `icon`, `auth`, `tier`, `visibility` — drives Homepage widgets, docs, cert strategy | High |
| B2 | **Auto-generate Homepage widget** from `app.yaml` when scaffolding | High |
| B3 | **`list-apps.sh`** — scan `kubernetes/` dirs, print: App \| URL \| Auth \| Tier \| Health | Medium |
| B4 | **`validate-app.sh`** — pre-push checks: namespace matches dir, IngressRoute hosts match cert dnsNames | Medium |
| B5 | **Interactive `new-app.sh` wizard** (`--interactive` flag with fzf-style prompts) | Low |
| B6 | **VSCode workspace settings** — `.vscode/` with K8s YAML snippets, recommended extensions, schema validation | Low |
| B7 | **`port-forward.sh`** — quick `kubectl port-forward` to any app by name | Medium |
| B8 | **`exec-into.sh`** — shortcut to shell into first running pod by app name | Low |
| B9 | **`add-auth.sh`** — retroactively add auth middleware to existing app's IngressRoute | Medium |

---

## C. Observability

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| C1 | **Per-app ServiceMonitor template** in `docs/templates/app/manifests/` (generated by `new-app.sh`) | High |
| C2 | **Per-app Grafana dashboard template** — request rate, error rate, pod restarts configmap | Medium |
| C3 | **Uptime Kuma** deployment — auto-configure probes from app URLs | Medium |
| C4 | **Loki + Promtail** in monitoring tier — centralized log aggregation | High |
| C5 | **Alerting rules template** — `PrometheusRule` for crash loops, OOM, high CPU | Medium |

---

## D. CI/CD Improvements

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| D1 | **ArgoCD diff on PR** — GitHub Action posts `argocd app diff` comment before merge | High |
| D2 | **`rollback.yml` workflow** — `workflow_dispatch` with app-name input: revert to previous ArgoCD sync | High |
| D3 | **Deployment status webhook** — post deploy result to Discord/Telegram/Matrix | Medium |
| D4 | **Renovate Bot** — auto-PRs for Helm chart + image updates | High |
| D5 | **ArgoCD Image Updater** — watch registries, auto-commit new tags | Medium |
| D6 | **App version drift detection** — weekly scan: running image vs. latest available | Low |

---

## E. Modularity / Pure IAC

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| E1 | **Kustomize overlays** — `base/` + `overlays/{dev,staging,prod}` for env-specific configs | Medium |
| E2 | **App catalog** — auto-generated `docs/CATALOG.md` from `app.yaml` files in `kubernetes/` | Medium |
| E3 | **`app.yaml` → Homepage auto-sync** in `apply-changes.yml` | Medium |
| E4 | **Wildcard vs. individual cert flag** in `new-app.sh` (default: individual to avoid rate limits) | Medium |
| E5 | **Environment-specific values overlays** (`values.dev.yaml`, `values.prod.yaml`) | Low |

---

## F. Security Hardening

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| F1 | **PSA labels** — auto-apply `pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted` to generated namespaces | High |
| F2 | **RBAC per-app templates** — Role + RoleBinding scoped to app's ServiceAccount | Medium |
| F3 | **Secret rotation workflow** — `rotate-secrets.yml`: regenerate app secrets in OpenBao + rolling restart | Medium |
| F4 | **Per-app rate limiting** — middleware template (currently only global rate-limit-auth exists) | Medium |
| F5 | **Security headers middleware** — `secure-headers` Traefik middleware (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options) | High |
| F6 | **Falco** runtime security — detect anomalous pod behavior | Low |

---

## G. Networking

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| G1 | **ExternalDNS operator** — auto-create DNS records when IngressRoutes are created | High |
| G2 | **Internal CA for `.int.` routes** — cert-manager ClusterIssuer backed by private CA (no LE rate limit) | High |
| G3 | **Per-app cert vs. wildcard** selector in `new-app.sh` (`--wildcard-cert` reuses existing wildcard) | Medium |

---

## H. User Management

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| H1 | **Self-service onboarding form** — static form → `workflow_dispatch` → commit to `users.yaml` | Medium |
| H2 | **User audit log** — Authentik events → Loki → Grafana dashboard | Medium |
| H3 | **NetBird per-group route policies** — different VPN route access per user group | High |
| H4 | **Time-limited guest tokens** — temporary Authentik invite link for specific app | Low |

---

## I. Documentation

| # | Feature | Priority |
|---|---------|----------|
| I1 | **Architecture diagram** — Mermaid in `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` showing request flow | Medium |
| I2 | **New contributor guide** — `CONTRIBUTING.md`: clone → secrets → first app | High |
| I3 | **Auto-generated app catalog** — from `app.yaml` files scanned by a script | Low |

---

## Implementation Order (Recommended)

**Phase 1 (High value, low effort):**
1. G2 — Internal CA (eliminates LE rate limit risk for `.int.` routes)
2. F5 — Security headers middleware
3. C1 — ServiceMonitor template in `new-app.sh`
4. D1 — ArgoCD diff on PRs
5. D2 — Rollback workflow

**Phase 2 (High value, medium effort):**
6. D4 — Renovate Bot
7. G1 — ExternalDNS
8. C4 — Loki + Promtail
9. B1+B2 — app.yaml + Homepage auto-widget

**Phase 3 (Nice to have):**
10. C3 — Uptime Kuma
11. B3 — list-apps.sh
12. H1 — Self-service onboarding
